advancement.hsj.amber_eye.name: The Amber Eye
advancement.hsj.amber_eye.desc: Find the Amber Eye at the heart of a strange forest
advancement.hsj.aquatic_eye.name: The Aquatic Eye
advancement.hsj.aquatic_eye.desc: Catch the Aquatic Eye while trawling the deep
advancement.hsj.archaic_eye.name: The Archaic Eye
advancement.hsj.archaic_eye.desc: Find the Archaic Eye while rediscovering the past
advancement.hsj.chimaeric_eye.name: The Chimaeric Eye
advancement.hsj.chimaeric_eye.desc: Craft the Chimaeric Eye with the spoils of exotic creatures
advancement.hsj.bound_eye.name: The Bound Eye
advancement.hsj.bound_eye.desc: Retrieve the Bound Eye from a mage of the mansion
advancement.hsj.curious_eye.name: The Curious Eye
advancement.hsj.curious_eye.desc: Find the Curious Eye in an enemy outpost
advancement.hsj.elder_eye.name: The Elder Eye
advancement.hsj.elder_eye.desc: Retrieve the Elder Eye from an ancient guardian
advancement.hsj.eldritch_eye.name: The Eldritch Eye
advancement.hsj.eldritch_eye.desc: Find the Eldritch Eye in a archaic city deep beneath the surface
advancement.hsj.creeping_eye.name: The Creeping Eye
advancement.hsj.creeping_eye.desc: Find the Creeping Eye in a desert tomb
advancement.hsj.forged_eye.name: The Forged Eye
advancement.hsj.forged_eye.desc: Obtain the Forged Eye from a master weaponsmith
advancement.hsj.golden_eye.name: The Golden Eye
advancement.hsj.golden_eye.desc: Find the Golden Eye in a temple in the jungle
advancement.hsj.ominous_eye.name: The Ominous Eye
advancement.hsj.ominous_eye.desc: Find the Ominous Eye at the end of an arduous trial
advancement.hsj.opulent_eye.name: The Opulent Eye
advancement.hsj.opulent_eye.desc: Find the Opulent Eye in a buried chest full of treasure
advancement.hsj.queens_eye.name: The Queen's Eye
advancement.hsj.queens_eye.desc: Find the Queen's Eye within a hive
advancement.hsj.spellbound_eye.name: The Spellbound Eye
advancement.hsj.spellbound_eye.desc: Uncover the Spellbound Eye while enchanting an item
advancement.hsj.withered_eye.name: The Withered Eye
advancement.hsj.withered_eye.desc: Retrieve the Withered Eye from a beast with three heads
advancement.hsj.root.name: Gateway
advancement.hsj.all_eyes.name: Monomyth
advancement.hsj.all_eyes.desc: Obtain every eye in Hero's Journey
hsj.eye_rejected: The portal rejects the eye... More powerful eyes are needed...
hsj.name: Hero's Journey
hsj.dialog.description: A datapack inspired by End Remastered, gather eyes and go to The End!
